mapper.sql: cardOrderId, userId, cardId, deviceId, orderNo, transactionNo, paySum,couponId, payType, realPayment, wrist, wristPrice, storeAddressId, userAddressId,sendType, status, validityDate, oldValidityDate, createdDate, payTime, finishTime,type,storeAddrIds,useCount ,nextPrice,nextPriceTitle,nextPrice2 ,nextPriceTitle2,nextPrice3,nextPriceTitle3,agent5Ids,agent6Ids
mapper.insert: insert into card_order (cardOrderId, userId, cardId, orderNo, transactionNo, paySum, couponId, deviceId, payType, realPayment, wrist, wristPrice, storeAddressId, userAddressId, sendType, status, validityDate, oldValidityDate, createdDate, payTime, finishTime,type,storeAddrIds,useCount,nextPrice,nextPriceTitle,nextPrice2 ,nextPriceTitle2,nextPrice3,nextPriceTitle3,agent5Ids,agent6Ids) values (#{cardOrderId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{cardId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{orderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{transactionNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{paySum,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, #{couponId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{deviceId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{payType,jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{realPayment,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, #{wrist,jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{sendType,jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{wristPrice,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, #{storeAddressId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{userAddressId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{status,jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{validityDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{oldValidityDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createdDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{payTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{finishTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{type,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{storeAddrIds,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{useCount,jdbcType=INTEGER} , #{nextPrice,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{nextPriceTitle,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{nextPrice2,jdbcType=DECIMAL} , #{nextPriceTitle2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{nextPrice3,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{nextPriceTitle3,jdbcType=VARCHAR} , #{agent5Ids,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{agent6Ids,jdbcType=VARCHAR})

insert into card_order
cardOrderId,
userId,
cardId,
orderNo,
transactionNo,
paySum,
couponId,
deviceId,
payType,
realPayment,
wrist,
wristPrice,
storeAddressId,
userAddressId,
sendType,
status,
validityDate,
oldValidityDate,
createdDate,
payTime,
finishTime,
autoPay,
selecteFree,
type,
storeAddrIds,
useCount,
buyCount,
nextPrice,
nextPriceTitle,
nextPrice2,
nextPriceTitle2,
nextPrice3,
nextPriceTitle3,
agent5Ids,
agent6Ids,
flash_sale_activity_id,

mapper.update:
update card_order
userId = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
cardId = #{cardId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
orderNo = #{orderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
transactionNo = #{transactionNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
paySum = #{paySum,jdbcType=DOUBLE},
couponId = #{couponId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
deviceId = #{deviceId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
payType = #{payType,jdbcType=TINYINT},
realPayment = #{realPayment,jdbcType=DOUBLE},
wrist = #{wrist,jdbcType=TINYINT},
wristPrice = #{wristPrice,jdbcType=DOUBLE},
storeAddressId = #{storeAddressId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
userAddressId = #{userAddressId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
sendType = #{sendType,jdbcType=TINYINT},
status = #{status,jdbcType=TINYINT},
validityDate = #{validityDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
oldValidityDate = #{oldValidityDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
createdDate = #{createdDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
payTime = #{payTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
finishTime = #{finishTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
type = #{type,jdbcType=INTEGER},
storeAddrIds = #{storeAddrIds,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
useCount = #{useCount,jdbcType=INTEGER},
nextPrice = #{nextPrice,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
nextPriceTitle = #{nextPriceTitle,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
nextPrice2 = #{nextPrice2,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
nextPriceTitle2 = #{nextPriceTitle2,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
nextPrice3 = #{nextPrice3,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
nextPriceTitle3 = #{nextPriceTitle3,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
agent5Ids = #{agent5Ids,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
agent6Ids = #{agent6Ids,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where cardOrderId = #{cardOrderId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: SELECT fc.fitCardId, fc.cardPrice, fc.cardType, date_format(d.validityDate, '%Y-%m-%d') AS validityDate, date_format(d.oldValidityDate, '%Y-%m-%d') AS oldValidityDate, fc.cardRule, fc.cardImgUrl, d.autoPay, d.storeAddrIds, d.useCount, c.ctName FROM device d INNER JOIN fit_card fc ON fc.fitCardId = d.fitCardId INNER JOIN card_type c ON c.cardType = fc.cardType WHERE d.proxyId = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT} AND d.status in (0,1) ORDER BY d.id DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM card_order WHERE userId = #{userId} AND status = 4 ORDER BY createdDate limit 1
select storeId from store_address where storeAddrId = #{storeAddrId}
SELECT * FROM card_order WHERE userId = #{userId} AND status = 0 ORDER BY createdDate limit 1
mapper.update: UPDATE card_order SET status = #{status} WHERE orderNo = #{orderNo} limit 1
